refinement: Refinement 1 fp32 Sigma-x2 reduce scale bug
root_cause: ReduceTile cross-call Accumulate reloads a reduced partial-mean per block; the reduce+reload roundtrip loses fp32 precision, undercounting mean(x2) linear in W
fix: switch fp32 tile-aligned path to ReduceAlgorithm::AccumulateViaAdd (raw Sigma-x2 tile in fp32 accumulator, 1/W via last-chunk post_reduce_op); keep bf16 and fp32-non-aligned on ReduceTile

scope: wire compute_kernel_config: bf8b intermediate CBs -> bf16
UnpackToDestFp32: none qualify (all fp32 intermediates feed FPU)
reuse: extend shared kernels via CT-arg gamma-layout branch; intermediate_dtype maps bf8b->bf16, identity for bf16/fp32 (byte-identical to prior passing cells)

finding: bf8b element_size() throws (block format) -> fixed with _elt() guard; bf8b non-aligned INPUT passes golden check_output (PCC>=0.99, rel-RMS<=0.10) for all 9 non-aligned shapes -> NO exclusion needed. bf16+fp32_dest_acc_en=False PCC=0.99999. All TILE-gamma variants + bf8b gamma pass.

detail: All 13 fails are bf16 wide-W reduce-accum precision (R1-analog): 1 loose bf16+True W=32768 (rms 0.404), 12 translated bf16+False W=4096 (frob 0.05225 vs 0.052, uniform data). R2 axes bf8b/bf8b-gamma/TILE-gamma fully green; drop {bf16,False} green in cartesian, near-miss on translated. Cheap lever (fp32 cb_sumsq) measured = net regression, reverted. Disposition: [~] partial, file R2a for bf16 AccumulateViaAdd datapath.

change: Extended AccumulateViaAdd fp32-raw-accumulator datapath to bf16 tile-aligned (gate IS_FP32->USE_ACC_VIA_ADD; cb_sumsq forced fp32 for bf16 via sumsq_dtype). Minimal delta on R1 path, no new kernel.

detail: case1 W=32768 rms 0.4046->0.0038 (ratio 1.405->1.003); case2 bf16+False W=4096 frob ~0.052->~0.006. test_golden 1683 passed/0 failed; test_translated 84 passed; unit 106 passed --dev+non-dev. Both Done-when gates met.
